responsibilities: Develop and articulate cross-asset trading strategies based on macroeconomic trends, central bank policy, and geopolitical events
Conduct in-depth research on global markets to identify directional and relative-value trading opportunities across asset classes
Present actionable trade recommendations and strategic outlooks to portfolio managers, traders, and institutional clients
Build quantitative models to backtest strategy performance under historical and hypothetical macroeconomic regime scenarios
Monitor economic indicators, central bank communications, and geopolitical developments to refine market views and positioning
Collaborate with risk and portfolio management teams to size trades and define stop-loss and risk parameters
Author regular market commentary and strategy notes distributed to internal trading desks and external clients
Evaluate correlations and regime shifts across equities, rates, FX, and commodities to inform tactical asset allocation
